narrative:
Montgomery County has 359,621 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points. Millennials are the largest generational cohort at 26.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +3.7% D−R vs -1.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
